name: vscode-kolm-rag
displayName: Kolm RAG: passive monitor + distill workflow
description: W819 - Passive Copilot/Cursor/Claude-Code suggestion-acceptance monitor, repetition-cluster detection, and post-distill local-student routing for VS Code.

kolm.cluster.threshold.description: W819-3 - minimum cluster count before the status-bar 'ready to distill' CTA lights up.

kolm.teacher.preference.description: W819-5 - preferred teacher model for distill jobs. 'auto' lets the kolm runtime choose.

kolm.namespace.description: W819-5 - namespace used for captures + downstream distill artifacts.

kolm.routing.enabled.description: W819-4 - after a distill job completes, route matching completion requests (Jaccard > 0.7) to the local student.

kolm.routing.jaccardThreshold.description: W819-4 - Jaccard similarity required against cluster fingerprints before routing to the local student.

kolm.passiveMonitor.enabled.description: W819-1 - watch document changes for large-block insertions (Copilot/Cursor/Claude-Code suggestion-acceptance signals).

kolm.passiveMonitor.minBlockChars.description: W819-1 - minimum inserted-block size (chars) for the passive monitor to treat a change as a suggestion-acceptance.
